
## Starting tcp connection

```json
{
  "type" : "init",
  "content" : {
    "cat": "dev00",
    "timestamp": "2025-02-19 04:37:16",
    "context" : ""
  }
}
```
## Sending logs

```json
{
  "type": "log",
  "content" : {
    "data" : "I (56) boot: chip revision: v3.0"
  }
}
```

## Sending raw sensor data

```json
{
  "type" : "raw",
  "content" : {
    "time_ms" : 1234,
    "data" : ""
  }
}
```
